seoTitle: Loomberah vs Lords Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Loomberah and Lords Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Loomberah vs Lords Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Loomberah and Lords Hill.
heading: Loomberah vs Lords Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Loomberah, New South Wales and Lords Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lords Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Loomberah (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Loomberah or Lords Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Loomberah has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Lords Hill scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Loomberah scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Lords Hill scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Loomberah or Lords Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lords Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
